sections.paragraph:
Original: דּלילה

Transliteration: delı̂ylâh

Phonetic: del-ee-law'

BDB Definition:

Delilah = "feeble"
  1. the Philistine mistress of Samson who betrayed the secret of his great strength, and by cutting his hair, enfeebled him and delivered him to the Philistines

Origin: from H1809

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Feminine
